files.AGENTS.md: Read `.waef/waef.lock.yml` and the exact locked WAEF source before work. Profiles: r-package. Stop if the source cannot be verified. Project rules may strengthen but never weaken WAEF.

files..github/workflows/waef-compliance.yml:
name: WAEF Compliance
on: [pull_request]
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  compliance:
    uses: weiandata/WAEF/.github/workflows/compliance.yml@993ef1e41306146f62881106ab17cae2e23162f5
    with:
      waef_commit: 993ef1e41306146f62881106ab17cae2e23162f5
      lock_path: .waef/waef.lock.yml
    secrets:
      WAEF_APP_ID: ${{ secrets.WAEF_APP_ID }}
      WAEF_APP_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.WAEF_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
